sp_widget.name: Reports_DM
sp_widget.template:
Reports & Analytics

Migration performance insights and trends

Filters:
Total Runs

{{c.filteredStats().total}}

{{c.kpiTrend('runs').direction==='up' ? '+' : '-'}} {{c.kpiTrend('runs').value}} change

Success Rate

{{ (c.filteredStats().success / c.filteredStats().total * 100 || 0) | number:0 }}%

{{c.kpiTrend('success').direction==='up' ? '+' : '-'}} {{c.kpiTrend('success').value}} change

Records Migrated

{{c.filteredStats().records}}

Across all tables

Avg Duration

{{c.filteredStats().avg_duration}}s

{{c.kpiTrend('duration').direction==='up' ? 'Improved' : 'Slower'}}

Records Migrated Over Time
Success Distribution
Instance Distribution
Top 5 Migrated Tables
Migrations across tables over time
Table Performance Details
TABLE NAME TOTAL RECORDS MIGRATION RUNS STATUS AVG DURATION PERFORMANCE
{{t.name}} {{t.records | number}} {{t.runs}} runs ✔ Success ⚠ Partial ✖ Failed {{t.avg_duration}} ⚡ Excellent ⚡ Good ⚡ Slow
